title: Kitab al-Tawasin: The Book of the Letter Ta-Sin
description: Al-Hallaj's mystical treatise on the light of Muhammad, the fall of Iblis (Satan), and the nature of divine love.
introduction: Al-Hallaj's mystical treatise on the light of Muhammad, the fall of Iblis (Satan), and the nature of divine love.

translation.text: The moth flies into the flame because it sees only light. So the mystic flies to God.
